speaker: IAGO
text: Here, stand behind this bulk. Straight will he come.

speaker: IAGO
text: Wear thy good rapier bare, and put it home.

speaker: IAGO
text: Quick, quick! Fear nothing. I’ll be at thy elbow.

speaker: IAGO
text: It makes us or it mars us—think on that,

speaker: IAGO
text: And fix most firm thy resolution.

speaker: RODERIGO
text: Be near at hand. I may miscarry in ’t.

speaker: IAGO
text: Here, at thy hand. Be bold and take thy stand.

speaker: RODERIGO
text: I have no great devotion to the deed,

speaker: RODERIGO
text: And yet he hath given me satisfying reasons.

speaker: RODERIGO
text: ’Tis but a man gone. Forth, my sword! He dies.

speaker: IAGO
text: I have rubbed this young quat almost to the sense,

speaker: IAGO
text: And he grows angry. Now, whether he kill Cassio,

speaker: IAGO
text: Or Cassio him, or each do kill the other,

speaker: IAGO
text: Every way makes my gain. Live Roderigo,

speaker: IAGO
text: He calls me to a restitution large

speaker: IAGO
text: Of gold and jewels that I bobbed from him

speaker: IAGO
text: As gifts to Desdemona.

speaker: IAGO
text: It must not be. If Cassio do remain,

speaker: IAGO
text: He hath a daily beauty in his life

speaker: IAGO
text: That makes me ugly. And besides, the Moor

speaker: IAGO
text: May unfold me to him. There stand I in much peril.

speaker: IAGO
text: No, he must die. Be ’t so. I hear him coming.

speaker: RODERIGO
text: I know his gait. ’Tis he!—Villain, thou diest!

speaker: CASSIO
text: That thrust had been mine enemy indeed

speaker: CASSIO
text: But that my coat is better than thou know’st.

speaker: CASSIO
text: I will make proof of thine.

speaker: RODERIGO
text: O, I am slain!

speaker: CASSIO
text: I am maimed forever! Help, ho! Murder, murder!

speaker: OTHELLO
text: The voice of Cassio! Iago keeps his word.

speaker: RODERIGO
text: O, villain that I am!

speaker: OTHELLO
text: It is even so.

speaker: CASSIO
text: O, help ho! Light! A surgeon!

speaker: OTHELLO
text: ’Tis he! O brave Iago, honest and just,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: That hast such noble sense of thy friend’s wrong!

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Thou teachest me.—Minion, your dear lies dead,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: And your unblest fate hies. Strumpet, I come.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Forth of my heart those charms, thine eyes, are blotted.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Thy bed, lust-stained, shall with lust’s blood be spotted.

speaker: CASSIO
text: What ho! No watch? No passage? Murder, murder!

speaker: GRATIANO
text: ’Tis some mischance. The voice is very direful.

speaker: CASSIO
text: O, help!

speaker: LODOVICO
text: Hark!

speaker: RODERIGO
text: O wretched villain!

speaker: LODOVICO
text: Two or three groan. ’Tis heavy night.

speaker: LODOVICO
text: These may be counterfeits. Let’s think ’t unsafe

speaker: LODOVICO
text: To come in to the cry without more help.

speaker: RODERIGO
text: Nobody come? Then shall I bleed to death.

speaker: LODOVICO
text: Hark!

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Here’s one comes in his shirt, with light and weapons.

speaker: IAGO
text: Who’s there? Whose noise is this that cries on murder?

speaker: LODOVICO
text: We do not know.

speaker: IAGO
text: Did not you hear a cry?

speaker: CASSIO
text: Here, here! For heaven’s sake, help me!

speaker: IAGO
text: What’s the matter?

speaker: GRATIANO
text: This is Othello’s ancient, as I take it.

speaker: LODOVICO
text: The same indeed, a very valiant fellow.

speaker: IAGO
text: What are you here that cry so grievously?

speaker: CASSIO
text: Iago? O, I am spoiled, undone by villains.

speaker: CASSIO
text: Give me some help!

speaker: IAGO
text: O me, lieutenant! What villains have done this?

speaker: CASSIO
text: I think that one of them is hereabout

speaker: CASSIO
text: And cannot make away.

speaker: IAGO
text: O treacherous villains!

speaker: IAGO
text:
To
                 
                Lodovico
                 
                and
                 
                Gratiano
                .
                 
              What are you there?

speaker: IAGO
text: Come in, and give some help.

speaker: RODERIGO
text: O, help me here!

speaker: CASSIO
text: That’s one of them.

speaker: IAGO
text: O murd’rous slave! O villain!

speaker: RODERIGO
text: O damned Iago! O inhuman dog!

speaker: IAGO
text: Kill men i’ th’ dark?—Where be these bloody thieves?

speaker: IAGO
text: How silent is this town! Ho, murder, murder!—

speaker: IAGO
text: What may you be? Are you of good or evil?

speaker: LODOVICO
text: As you shall prove us, praise us.

speaker: IAGO
text: Signior Lodovico?

speaker: LODOVICO
text: He, sir.

speaker: IAGO
text: I cry you mercy. Here’s Cassio hurt by villains.

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Cassio?

speaker: IAGO
text: How is ’t, brother?

speaker: CASSIO
text: My leg is cut in two.

speaker: IAGO
text: Marry, heaven forbid!

speaker: IAGO
text: Light, gentlemen. I’ll bind it with my shirt.

speaker: BIANCA
text: What is the matter, ho? Who is ’t that cried?

speaker: IAGO
text: Who is ’t that cried?

speaker: BIANCA
text: O, my dear Cassio,

speaker: BIANCA
text: My sweet Cassio! O Cassio, Cassio, Cassio!

speaker: IAGO
text: O notable strumpet! Cassio, may you suspect

speaker: IAGO
text: Who they should be that have thus mangled you?

speaker: CASSIO
text: No.

speaker: GRATIANO
text: I am sorry to find you thus; I have been to seek you.

speaker: IAGO
text: Lend me a garter. So.—O for a chair

speaker: IAGO
text: To bear him easily hence!

speaker: BIANCA
text: Alas, he faints. O, Cassio, Cassio, Cassio!

speaker: IAGO
text: Gentlemen all, I do suspect this trash

speaker: IAGO
text: To be a party in this injury.—

speaker: IAGO
text: Patience awhile, good Cassio.—Come, come;

speaker: IAGO
text:
Lend me a light.
                 
                Peering
                 
                at
                 
                Roderigo
                .
               Know we this face or no?

speaker: IAGO
text: Alas, my friend and my dear countryman

speaker: IAGO
text: Roderigo? No! Yes, sure. O heaven, Roderigo!

speaker: GRATIANO
text: What, of Venice?

speaker: IAGO
text: Even he, sir. Did you know him?

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Know him? Ay.

speaker: IAGO
text: Signior Gratiano? I cry your gentle pardon.

speaker: IAGO
text: These bloody accidents must excuse my manners

speaker: IAGO
text: That so neglected you.

speaker: GRATIANO
text: I am glad to see you.

speaker: IAGO
text: How do you, Cassio?—O, a chair, a chair!

speaker: GRATIANO
text: Roderigo?

speaker: IAGO
text:
He, he, ’tis he!
                 
                A
                 
                chair
                 
                is
                 
                brought
                 
                in
                .
               O, that’s well said; the chair.—

speaker: IAGO
text: Some good man bear him carefully from hence.

speaker: IAGO
text: I’ll fetch the General’s surgeon.— For you, mistress,

speaker: IAGO
text: Save you your labor.—He that lies slain here, Cassio,

speaker: IAGO
text: Was my dear friend. What malice was between you?

speaker: CASSIO
text: None in the world. Nor do I know the man.

speaker: IAGO
text: What, look you pale?—O, bear him out o’ th’ air.

speaker: IAGO
text:
To
                 
                Gratiano
                 
                and
                 
                Lodovico
                .
                 
              Stay you, good gentlemen.—Look you pale, mistress?—

speaker: IAGO
text: Do you perceive the gastness of her eye?—

speaker: IAGO
text: Nay, if you stare, we shall hear more anon.—

speaker: IAGO
text: Behold her well. I pray you, look upon her.

speaker: IAGO
text: Do you see, gentlemen? Nay, guiltiness will speak

speaker: IAGO
text: Though tongues were out of use.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Alas, what is the matter? What is the matter, husband?

speaker: IAGO
text: Cassio hath here been set on in the dark

speaker: IAGO
text: By Roderigo and fellows that are scaped.

speaker: IAGO
text: He’s almost slain, and Roderigo dead.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Alas, good gentleman! Alas, good Cassio!

speaker: IAGO
text: This is the fruits of whoring. Prithee, Emilia,

speaker: IAGO
text: Go know of Cassio where he supped tonight.

speaker: IAGO
text:
To
                 
                Bianca
                .
                 
              What, do you shake at that?

speaker: BIANCA
text: He supped at my house, but I therefore shake not.

speaker: IAGO
text: O, did he so? I charge you go with me.

speaker: EMILIA
text: O fie upon thee, strumpet!

speaker: BIANCA
text: I am no strumpet, but of life as honest

speaker: BIANCA
text: As you that thus abuse me.

speaker: EMILIA
text: As I? Faugh! Fie upon thee!

speaker: IAGO
text: Kind gentlemen, let’s go see poor Cassio dressed.—

speaker: IAGO
text: Come, mistress, you must tell ’s another tale.—

speaker: IAGO
text: Emilia, run you to the citadel

speaker: IAGO
text: And tell my lord and lady what hath happed.—

speaker: IAGO
text:
Will you go on afore?
                 
                Aside
                .
               This is the night

speaker: IAGO
text: That either makes me or fordoes me quite.
